context: The solution must verify cross-references both structurally and semantically, reading the surrounding context of each reference and the actual content of the referenced clause to determine whether the reference is genuinely correct. Uncertain cases must be flagged for manual review rather than acted upon.

checklist.name: Reads surrounding context
checklist.description: Examines text around each reference to understand its intent

checklist.name: Reads referenced clause content
checklist.description: Reads the actual content of the referenced clause, not just its heading

checklist.name: Mismatch identification
checklist.description: Correctly flags references where the referenced clause content does not match the stated intent

checklist.name: Uncertain handling
checklist.description: Flags uncertain cases for manual review instead of making potentially wrong changes
